mapper.sql: SELECT ID, TRUST_ID, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_BUS_TRUST_LOCATION
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_TRUST_LOCATION(ID, TRUST_ID, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storehouseId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storehouseName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regionId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regionName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_TRUST_LOCATION
ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STOREHOUSE_ID = #{storehouseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STOREHOUSE_NAME = #{storehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REGION_ID = #{regionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REGION_NAME = #{regionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

begin
UPDATE T_BUS_TRUST_LOCATION SET
ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STOREHOUSE_ID = #{storehouseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STOREHOUSE_NAME = #{storehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REGION_ID = #{regionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REGION_NAME = #{regionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id};
end;
mapper.select: SELECT BUSINESS_NO FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO WHERE TRUST_ID = #{trustId}

SELECT CONCAT( CONCAT(M3.STORAGE_YARD_NM, '/'), M2.STORAGE_YARD_NM ) as "label", CONCAT( CONCAT(M3.STORAGE_YARD_NM, '/'), M2.STORAGE_YARD_NM ) as "massNameFull", M2.ID as "value", M3.ID as "storehouseId", M3.STORAGE_YARD_NM as "storehouseName", M2.ID as "regionId", M2.STORAGE_YARD_NM as "regionName" FROM M_STORAGE_YARD M2, M_STORAGE_YARD M3 WHERE M2.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '2' AND M2.PARENT_ID = M3.ID AND M3.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '1' AND M2.ID in( select distinct REGION_ID from T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE where CLEAN_MASS_SIGN = '0' and CARGO_INFO_ID in (select T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO.CARGO_INFO_ID from T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO where TRUST_ID =#{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ) )
